SampleAbilities.TextExcerpt: Your training and Elven grace allows you to remove all roots and snares from yourself and your War Lion.  For the next {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, roots and snares will have no effect on you or your War Lion.

Your training and Elven grace allows you to remove all roots and snares from yourself and your War Lion.  For the next {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, roots and snares will have no effect on you or your War Lion.

At your command, your War Lion goes berserk with a killing frenzy! All root, snare, and stun effects are removed from your pet, and it becomes immune to them for the next {COM_3_DURA_SECONDS}. During this time, your pet will deal an additional {COM_5_VAL0_DAMAGE} every time it strikes an enemy.
Damage can only trigger once every 2 seconds.
